title: Sheet Music
author: Joanne Lipman, Melanie Kupchynsky
subline: Uncovering the secrets of couple's chemistry.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A musical staff with two lines of notes — one upper (the SHE voice) and one lower (the HE voice). A few notes overlap in the middle (the chemistry). One note = RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1100)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif">
    <!-- Two staves, each 5 lines, stacked vertically -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1">
      <!-- Upper staff: SHE -->
      <g transform="translate(0 -100)">
        <line x1="-700" y1="-60" x2="700" y2="-60"/>
        <line x1="-700" y1="-30" x2="700" y2="-30"/>
        <line x1="-700" y1="0" x2="700" y2="0"/>
        <line x1="-700" y1="30" x2="700" y2="30"/>
        <line x1="-700" y1="60" x2="700" y2="60"/>
      </g>
      <!-- Lower staff: HE -->
      <g transform="translate(0 200)">
        <line x1="-700" y1="-60" x2="700" y2="-60"/>
        <line x1="-700" y1="-30" x2="700" y2="-30"/>
        <line x1="-700" y1="0" x2="700" y2="0"/>
        <line x1="-700" y1="30" x2="700" y2="30"/>
        <line x1="-700" y1="60" x2="700" y2="60"/>
      </g>
    </g>
    <!-- SHE voice: 5 note heads -->
    <g fill="#cccccc">
      <ellipse cx="-560" cy="-30" rx="14" ry="10"/>
      <ellipse cx="-360" cy="-60" rx="14" ry="10"/>
      <ellipse cx="-160" cy="0" rx="14" ry="10"/>
      <ellipse cx="40" cy="-30" rx="14" ry="10"/>
      <ellipse cx="240" cy="60" rx="14" ry="10"/>
    </g>
    <!-- HE voice: 5 note heads -->
    <g fill="#cccccc">
      <ellipse cx="-440" cy="30" rx="14" ry="10"/>
      <ellipse cx="-240" cy="-30" rx="14" ry="10"/>
      <ellipse cx="-40" cy="60" rx="14" ry="10"/>
      <ellipse cx="160" cy="0" rx="14" ry="10"/>
      <ellipse cx="360" cy="-30" rx="14" ry="10"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The CHEMISTRY note: a single RED ellipse, perfectly overlapping between the two staves at x=200 -->
    <ellipse cx="200" cy="100" rx="18" ry="13" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- A connecting beam from both staves to the red note -->
    <line x1="200" y1="-30" x2="200" y2="90" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3 4"/>
    <!-- Labels under each staff -->
    <g font-size="14" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em" fill="#4c4c4c">
      <text x="-700" y="-160">SHE</text>
      <text x="-700" y="320">HE</text>
      <text x="700" y="200" text-anchor="end" fill="#fc1c46">CHEMISTRY</text>
    </g>
    <!-- Treble + bass clefs (simple glyphs) -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2" fill="none">
      <!-- Treble clef approximation: just a spiral + stem -->
      <path d="M -740 -120 Q -750 -80 -730 -50 Q -710 -20 -730 10 Q -750 30 -730 40"/>
      <!-- Bass clef approximation -->
      <path d="M -740 240 Q -730 200 -750 180 Q -770 160 -750 140"/>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Two musical staves — SHE above, HE below — with their notes interlocking. A single RED note sits between them where the melodies meet: the chemistry. 320px whisper title at the bottom.
